function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(pointwise_add[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](constant(a), f), pointwise_mul[Real, Real](constant(b), g)), x0)
function(x1: Real, x2: Real) { x1 * x2 = x2 * x1 }(Real.1, c)
function(x1: Real) { Real.1 * x1 = x1 }(c)

goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_add[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](constant(c), identity_fn[Real]), constant(b)), x0, c)
exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(pointwise_add[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](constant(c), identity_fn[Real]), constant(b)), x0, k0) }

p.c: function(x1: Real) { not has_derivative_at(pointwise_add[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](constant(c), identity_fn[Real]), constant(b)), x0, x1) }(c)
exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(pointwise_add[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](constant[Real, Real](c), identity_fn[Real]), constant[Real, Real](b)), x0, k0) }
let w0: Real satisfy { has_derivative_at(pointwise_add[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](constant(c), identity_fn[Real]), constant(b)), x0, w0) }

function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(pointwise_add[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](constant(c), identity_fn[Real]), constant(b)), x0)
